I agree with agent1’s assessment. Option A correctly states that the thoracic esophagus typically drains into the azygos vein. As per my earlier point on option D being valid due to the anastomosis involving both lower esophageal and left gastric veins, we can confirm that all statements provided have factual support from anatomy texts save for option C.
